name: discord
description: Discord bot: mention it and it answers from Elowen AI. Slash commands (/model, /new, /help), a per-channel model picker, live streaming replies (with the agent's live todo checklist), status reactions and proactive cron/tick pushes. Server tools (admin sessions): server/channel/member info, list & search members, roles, pins, threads (create/archive/lock/members), channels (create/rename/delete, categories) and message management (delete/purge). Each Discord role maps to allowed Elowen projects + a role prompt.

configSchema.label: Connection
configSchema.hint: The bot token and where it listens.

configSchema.label: Bot token
configSchema.hint: Discord Developer Portal → Bot → Token. Enable the Message Content intent.

configSchema.label: Guild ID
configSchema.hint: Optional: only respond in this server (empty = all servers the bot is in).

configSchema.label: Allowed threads
configSchema.hint: Comma-separated thread IDs. Empty = respond everywhere allowed. When set, the bot only responds inside these threads.

configSchema.label: Notification channel ID
configSchema.hint: Where proactive messages (cron/tick results, escalations) are posted. Empty = no proactive pushes.

configSchema.label: Replies & behavior
configSchema.hint: When and how the bot answers.

configSchema.label: Respond without mention
configSchema.hint: On: the bot answers every message in channels it can see (Iris-style). Off: it only answers when @mentioned.

configSchema.label: Live streaming replies
configSchema.hint: Edit the reply in place as it streams (tool calls + text). Off = one message at the end.

configSchema.label: Status reactions
configSchema.hint: React 👀 while thinking, ✅/❌ when done.

configSchema.label: Runtime footer
configSchema.hint: Append a small "model · context %" line under the final reply.

configSchema.label: Show reasoning
configSchema.hint: Stream the model's reasoning into the progress bubble (extended-thinking models). Off by default — it's usually noise on Discord.

configSchema.label: Service language
configSchema.hint: Language of the bot's own service messages (/new, /model, placeholders): en (default) or cs.

configSchema.label: Conversation
configSchema.hint: Context loading and image routing.

configSchema.label: Channel history backfill
configSchema.hint: How many recent channel messages a BRAND-NEW conversation loads as context (0 = off, max 100). Ongoing conversations never re-fetch.

configSchema.label: Vision model
configSchema.hint: Model used for turns that carry image attachments (must support vision). Empty = the channel's normal model.

configSchema.label: Media limits
configSchema.hint: Caps on inbound/outbound images and how long a pending question stays open.

configSchema.label: Max inbound image size
configSchema.hint: Largest image attachment (bytes) the bot downloads for vision; bigger ones are noted instead.

configSchema.label: Max images per message
configSchema.hint: How many image attachments in a single incoming message the bot sends to the vision model.

configSchema.label: Max images per reply
configSchema.hint: How many generated images the bot attaches to a single outgoing reply.

configSchema.label: Question timeout (ms)
configSchema.hint: How long a pending ask_user_question stays open for a button click or free-text reply before it's dropped as stale.

configSchema.label: Voice
configSchema.hint: Speech-to-text and text-to-speech (optional; reuses the voice provider's key).

configSchema.label: Voice provider
configSchema.hint: Which configured OpenAI-compatible provider powers voice (Whisper STT + TTS) — reuses that provider's key, no separate key here. Add providers in Settings → Brain. Leave empty to keep voice off.

configSchema.label: Transcribe voice messages
configSchema.hint: Transcribe incoming voice messages / audio attachments with Whisper so the agent understands them. Needs the OpenAI API key.

configSchema.label: Speech-to-text model
configSchema.hint: Whisper transcription model (default: whisper-1).

configSchema.label: Speak replies (default)
configSchema.hint: Default for channels: attach a spoken-audio version of replies. Toggle live per channel with /voice. Needs the OpenAI API key.

configSchema.label: Text-to-speech model
configSchema.hint: TTS model (default: gpt-4o-mini-tts).

configSchema.label: TTS voice
configSchema.hint: Voice: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova or shimmer (default: alloy).

configSchema.label: Role policies
configSchema.hint: Map Discord roles to allowed projects, a role prompt and the tools the bot may use.

configSchema.label: Role policies
configSchema.hint: First matching role wins. Users with no mapped role are ignored. Each role may also restrict which tools the bot can use for them.
